author: jupram
name: Aux Bottleneck (AUX_DIM=64)
blurb: Baseline-style 9x512 SP-1024 run with the auxiliary network shrunk from two full-width transformer blocks to a small bottleneck editor (AUX_DIM=64). Improves compressed model size, but this specific logged run is still a near-miss at 16,050,614 total bytes, which is 50,614 bytes over the decimal 16MB cap.
